name: codex-deltas
description: Codex delta workflow skills, helper commands, and automation bundled as a single local plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Codex delta discovery, config regeneration, and reporting.
interface.longDescription: Bundles lane-oriented Codex delta orchestration, repo and config analysis, config synthesis, validation, reporting, and automation state updates into one local plugin.
defaultPrompt: Run the Codex delta orchestration workflow and summarize what changed.
Analyze Codex config deltas and regenerate the config artifacts.
Compose the Codex delta report from persisted repo and config findings.
